# Dashboard Configuration Reference

Key reference for `~/.config/lince-dashboard/config.toml`. Edit via `lince-config set <key> <value> --target dashboard`; validate with `lince-config validate --target dashboard`.

## `[dashboard]`

Dashboard behavior and defaults.

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `default_provider` | str | — | Default provider for new agents |
| `default_profile` | str | — | LEGACY alias of default_provider (pre-#81) |
| `sandbox_config_path` | str | `"~/.agent-sandbox/config.toml"` | Path to the sandbox config |
| `default_project_dir` | str | — | Default working directory for new agents |
| `default_agent_type` | str | — | Agent type preselected by the n shortcut and the N wizard |
| `sandbox_command` | str | `"agent-sandbox"` | Path to the agent-sandbox binary |
| `agent_layout` | `"tiled"` \| `"floating"` | `"tiled"` | How agent panes are created |
| `focus_mode` | `"replace"` \| `"floating"` | `"floating"` | How focusing an agent works |
| `status_method` | `"pipe"` \| `"file"` | `"pipe"` | Status detection method (file polling always runs; pipe is a fast-path) |
| `status_file_dir` | str | `"/tmp/lince-dashboard"` | Directory for per-agent .state files |
| `max_agents` | int | `9` | Maximum concurrent agents |
| `sandbox_backend` | str | — | Global backend preference |
| `sandbox_colors` | table | — | Color per sandbox level (paranoid/normal/permissive/default) |
| `project_search_roots` | list[string] | — | Roots scanned recursively by the wizard's Tab completion |
| `project_search_max_depth` | int | `3` | find -maxdepth for project_search_roots |
| `instance_icons` | list[string] | — | Pool of per-instance marker glyphs (#166); empty disables markers |

## `[agents.<name>]`

Agent-type overrides / custom agents (overlay the registry)

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `command` | list[string] | — | Legacy fallback command template ({agent_id}, {project_dir}, {provider}); ignored when sandbox_level is set |
| `pane_title_pattern` | str | — | Pattern matching Zellij pane titles for reconciliation |
| `status_pipe_name` | str | `"lince-status"` | Zellij pipe name for status messages |
| `display_name` | str | — | Full name shown in the UI |
| `short_label` | str | — | 3-char label for the table column |
| `color` | str | — | ANSI color name |
| `sandboxed` | bool | — | Whether the agent runs inside the sandbox |
| `has_native_hooks` | bool | `false` | Agent emits its own status events (no wrapper needed) |
| `home_ro_dirs` | list[string] | — | UNUSED by the plugin — the sandbox copy is authoritative |
| `home_rw_dirs` | list[string] | — | UNUSED by the plugin — the sandbox copy is authoritative |
| `bwrap_conflict` | bool | `false` | Agent uses bwrap internally (conflicts with the outer sandbox) |
| `disable_inner_sandbox_args` | list[string] | — | Args disabling the agent's own sandbox |
| `providers` | list[string] | — | ["__discover__"] = all discovered providers; [] = skip the provider step; or an explicit list |
| `profiles` | list[string] | — | LEGACY alias of providers (pre-#81) |
| `sandbox_backend` | str | — | Per-agent backend override (agent-sandbox/seatbelt/nono) |
| `sandbox_level` | str | — | Default isolation level in the wizard (paranoid/normal/permissive or custom) |
| `sandbox_levels` | list[string] | — | Pin the wizard level picker to this set (shells use ["normal"]) |
| `sandbox_home_subdir` | str | — | $HOME subdir rsynced to scratch by the paranoid nono wrapper |
| `env_vars` | table | — | Env vars exported at spawn ($VAR self-references inherit from the host env) |
| `event_map` | table | — | Agent event name -> canonical status (running/input/permission/stopped) |
